faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Edison range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Edison?
faqs.answer: Edison residents most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warm indoor spaces, while field crickets typically invade from yards and gardens. Camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces, which are common in many Edison homes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Edison homes can be controlled within 1-2 treatments. You'll notice a significant reduction in cricket activity within 24-48 hours of the initial treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks depending on infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will provide you with any necessary precautions. We also offer eco-friendly treatment options for Edison residents with specific concerns.
